name: Roast Lamb Leg
description: Delicious roast lamb leg, medium, with all the trimmings.

steps.name: Preheat
steps.description: Preheat the oven to the roast temperature

steps.name: Initial roast
steps.description: Roast lamb at the higher temperature

steps.name: Part Boil Potatoes
steps.description: Peel, cut to right size, and part boil potatoes.

steps.name: Prepare Stuffing
steps.description: Add boiling water to stuffing mix, and let sit for 5 minutes, then form into final shape (shallow dish, balls, slugs etc.)

steps.name: Main roast
steps.description: Turn down the temperature for the main roast

steps.name: Steam Vegetables
steps.description: Turn on the steamer so that the vegetables are steaming for about an hour.

steps.name: Roast Potatoes
steps.description: Drain the potatoes, ruffle them for extra crisp, add a spoonful of plain flour and stir through. Put potatoes back into the oven to roast, basting in the oil and juices from the main roast.

steps.name: Resting time
steps.description: Remove from oven and allow to rest covered on the side.

steps.name: Carve, and serve
steps.description: Carve the meat while the stuffing is finishing, and serve when ready.
